using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public sealed class BenchmarkResult
{
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; init; } = null!;
    public double Score { get; init; } = 0;
    public TimeSpan Duration { get; init; } = TimeSpan.Zero;
    public string? LogPath { get; init; }
    public bool Success { get; init; } = false;
}

public sealed class ResumableBenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;
    private readonly string _workDir;
    private readonly int _maxConcurrent;
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _semaphore;
    private readonly Dictionary<string, CancellationTokenSource> _cancellationMap;

    public ResumableBenchmarkRunner(int maxConcurrent = 1)
    {
        _httpClient = new HttpClient();
        _workDir = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), "benchmark_runs");
        _maxConcurrent = maxConcurrent;
        _semaphore = new SemaphoreSlim(maxConcurrent);
        _cancellationMap = new Dictionary<string, CancellationTokenSource>();
        Directory.CreateDirectory(_workDir);
    }

    public async Task<BenchmarkResult> RunAsync(BenchmarkContext context, CancellationToken ct = default)
    {
